paper.title: Unbound stars hold the key to young star cluster history

review.summary: Pure simulation and methodological paper. Two LaTeX tables: one simulation input parameter table, one observational subcluster summary table for Upper Sco. One external resource: Zenodo repository with simulation visualization movies. No machine-readable catalogs, data tables, or data-availability statement. The observational data (NGC 6530 and Upper Sco members) come from previously published catalogs (Wright2019, Luhman2020) - no direct URLs for those in the paper.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Documents the initial cluster parameters (N, mass, half-mass radius, total mass, embedded phase duration) used across the N-body simulation campaign.

source_refs.caption: Initial cluster parameters for the simulation campaign using mass-radius dependencies.
source_refs.label: tab:cluster_parameters

columns.name: N
columns.meaning: number of cluster member stars per simulation

columns.name: N_sim
columns.meaning: number of independent simulation realizations performed

internal_tables.evidence: Initial cluster parameters for the simulation campaign using mass-radius dependencies. See table foot for detailed column descriptions.
internal_tables.comments: Three cluster sizes simulated: N=200, 1000, 4000. Masses follow Kroupa IMF, sizes from Pfalzner+2016 mass-radius relation, SFE=30%.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Summarizes the properties (N, sky position, kinematic age, half-mass radius) of subclusters identified in Upper Sco via backtracking, compared with groups H and I from Kerr+2021.

source_refs.caption: Information about the subclusters identified in this work (ID: 1,2) and the groups from \cite{kerr_etal2021} (ID: H, I).
source_refs.label: tab:subgroups

columns.name: ID
columns.meaning: subcluster identifier (1,2 from this work; H,I from Kerr+2021)

columns.name: N
columns.meaning: number of member stars in the subcluster

columns.name: r_hm
columns.meaning: half-mass radius of subcluster at time of gas expulsion

internal_tables.evidence: Information about the subclusters identified in this work (ID: 1,2) and the groups from Kerr+2021 (ID: H, I). Table foot: Number of stars (N) and mean positions (RA, Dec) are provided along with the time of gas expulsion (t_K, kinematic age) and half-mass radius of subcluster at the time of gas expulsion (r_hm).
internal_tables.comments: Subclusters 1 and 2 are this work's results from backtracking Upper Sco members (Luhman2020 catalog). Groups H and I from Kerr+2021 HDBSCAN clustering for comparison. Negative t_K values indicate the backtracking places gas expulsion in the future relative to present, implying the method does not fully capture the cluster's true kinematic age.

external_resources.description: Zenodo repository containing films of the cluster dynamics simulations and backtracking visualizations for N=200 star clusters.

source_refs.context: A film of the cluster dynamics and the backtracking can be found at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6041920

external_resources.evidence: Figure 1 caption states: 'A film of the cluster dynamics and the backtracking can be found at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6041920'. Also referenced in body text (Sec 4.1.1) as 'the corresponding video at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6041920'.
external_resources.comments: Visualization resource, not machine-readable data. Contains MP4 videos of N-body simulations.
